title: Christmas Stickers – Over 700 Premium Gloss Paper Stickers for Children – Festive Xmas Decorations for Crafts, Scrapbooks, Card Making, Party Bags & Stocking Fillers – Santa, Reindeer, Snow
features: Over 700 Premium Christmas Stickers: Elevate your festive crafts with over 700 beautifully designed Christmas stickers. A premium set made to impress – perfect for cards, scrapbooks, party bags, gifts and decorations.

Exclusive Festive Designs: 15 unique sheets featuring Santa, reindeer, snowmen, Christmas trees and more, each sticker is carefully illustrated for a charming, timeless look. Designed in the UK to bring elegance and joy to every project.

Generous Sizing & Easy To Use: Our larger sheets and mix of sticker sizes offer superior convenience compared to smaller packs. Each sticker is easy to peel, applies smoothly, and creates a bold, eye-catching finish.

Crafted With Premium Quality: Printed on durable glossy paper with a smooth finish that enhances colour vibrancy. The non-toxic adhesive ensures safety for children, while the superior materials guarantee lasting results.

Unbeatable Value vs Competitors: With over 700 premium stickers in every pack, you’ll enjoy more variety, higher quality and better value than cheaper alternatives. The ultimate choice for festive crafting and family fun.
